zh.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers於大約1405年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆。她於1431年5月6日與Philip Dymoke結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年6月22日在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers于大约1405年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆。她于1431年5月6日与Philip Dymoke结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年6月22日在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比 考特享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers was born about 1405, in Durham, England, United Kingdom. She married Philip Dymoke on 6 May 1431. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 22 June 1485, in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers est née environ 1405, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Philip Dymoke le 6 mai 1431. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1485, à Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers wurde um 1405 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat am 6. Mai 1431 Philip Dymoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1485 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers è nata il circa 1405 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Philip Dymoke il 6 maggio 1431. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1485, nel Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Conyersは約1405年にイギリスイギリスダルハムで生まれた。1431年5月6日にPhilip Dymokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年6月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビー コウルトで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers(은)는 대략 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1431년 5월 6일 Philip Dymoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 6월 22일 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비 쿠르트에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Philip Dymoke em 6 de maio de 1431. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1485, em Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers родилась около 1405 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip Dymoke 6 мая 1431 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 июня 1485 г. в местности скривелсби коурт, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Conyers nació aproximadamente 1405, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Philip Dymoke el 6 de mayo de 1431. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1485, en Scrivelsby Court, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años.
